command_surface.surface_model: TigerKit Slim exposes Claude Code plugin commands only; commands/*.md and .claude-plugin/plugin.json own /tk:* contracts.
command_surface.plugin_version_policy: Authoritative version is .claude-plugin/plugin.json; evals must not hard-code a concrete version literal.

evals.name: plugin-version-and-command-manifest-slim
evals.prompt: Evaluate TigerKit Slim active command surface. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should list /tk:gap, /tk:afk, and /tk:reflect as core commands. Should list /tk:grill as an optional command included in the active manifest. Should list /tk:setup as the only management command. Should state /tk:config, /tk:launch, /tk:review, /tk:next, /tk:handoff, and /tk:meta-feedback are deprecated commands and not active manifest entries.
expectations: Does not include /tk:launch in active manifest
Does not include /tk:next in active manifest
Does not include /tk:handoff in active manifest

evals.name: gap-is-one-shot-analysis-lens
evals.prompt: Evaluate /tk:gap Slim behavior. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should compare SoT and Current Implementation, classify missing, mismatch, overbuilt, and ambiguous gaps, and report evidence, impact, priority, and suggested fixes. Should not generate a sealed workflow, workflow hash, launch state, autopilot policy, advisor, or runner.
expectations: Does not mention GAP_READY as active output

evals.name: grill-pressure-test-question-lens
evals.prompt: Evaluate /tk:grill behavior. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should define /tk:grill as an optional active micro command that pressure-tests proposals, plans, changes, and reviewer judgments through evidence-backed questions. Should close questions answerable from code/docs first, leave only owner-decision or missing-evidence questions open, support Patron candidate recommendation, and avoid treating grill output as confirmed defects.
expectations: Does not treat output as confirmed defect

evals.name: afk-patron-decision-delegation
evals.prompt: Evaluate /tk:afk behavior. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should define AFK as current-session user decision delegation using temporary Patrons, not background async work. Should keep Driver responsible for merge, use one primary Patron per decision by default, forbid Patron-to-Patron calls and always-on council debate, and record a structured decision ledger.
expectations: Fan-out only for independent risk axes

evals.name: patron-catalog-required-ids
evals.prompt: Evaluate Patron catalog. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should define reviewer, tester, security, webperf, steward, simplifier, and cartographer with schema fields id, display_name, summary, source, status, use_when, avoid_when, decision_style, default_outputs, and ledger_policy.

evals.name: setup-afk-default-and-vowline-opt-in
evals.prompt: Evaluate /tk:setup behavior. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should provide /tk:setup show/vowline on/vowline off/patrons list/install/enable/disable/afk default on/off/status/reflect show/reset as the only active management command surface. AFK default should be off after install; config state should be source of truth; user CLAUDE.md bridge should be activation aid; Vowline should be opt-in and not a TigerKit core dependency. If the external vowline skill is missing, /tk:setup vowline on should show install guidance pointing to the upstream INSTALL.md, require installation verification, and avoid finalizing the bridge until availability is confirmed.
expectations: Does not finalize bridge before availability confirmation

evals.name: reflect-file-policy-slim
evals.prompt: Evaluate /tk:reflect file policy. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should auto-apply repo-local changes only to CLAUDE.local.md, keep repo CLAUDE.md suggest-only, allow user-level improvements to auto apply, distinguish candidate/confirmed/session-local/deprecated, and allow Patron candidate/profile improvements.

evals.name: recommended-tools-are-recommendation-only
evals.prompt: Evaluate recommended tools policy. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should list Context Mode, RTK, and Superpowers as recommendation-only tools. Should not install them by default and should show them only when the user selects the optional recommended tools menu in /tk:setup. When upstream GitHub install docs are known, TigerKit should present those links and ask the user to verify installation before treating the tool as available.
expectations: Provides GitHub install guidance when available

evals.name: launch-era-features-deprecated
evals.prompt: Evaluate launch-era cleanup. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should document that gap autonomous workflow, /tk:launch, workflow freezing, mandatory advisor/runner, /tk:next, /tk:handoff, /tk:meta-feedback, and external tool embedding are ended or deprecated. Active plugin manifest should not register launch-era commands.
